scripts.dev: concurrently -n FE,BE -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix frontend && tsc --noEmit --project backend/tsconfig.json
